demo_starting.text: Demo playback starting. Cards will scroll automatically as the simulated GPS moves along the route.

fuel_stop.text: Fuel stop coming up. Top up before the next remote section.

fuel_stop_passing.text: Passing a fuel station. Top up if your gauge is low — the next one may be far.

pressure_check_passing.text: Tyre service is available at this stop if you need air or a repair.

pressure_lower.text: Tyre pressure action coming up. Lower pressure before the next section.

pressure_raise.text: Tyre pressure action coming up. Raise pressure for the upcoming road.

rain_warning.text: Rain is forecast on the road ahead. Slow down — gravel turns slippery and visibility drops.

sunset_risk_tight.text: Caution: arrival is close to sunset. Maintain current pace and do not stop for long.

sunset_risk_warning.text: Warning: you are at risk of arriving after sunset. Driving after dark is not permitted in Namibia. Consider stopping at the next safe town.
